name: Duel against the nutjob
description:
To encourage the students to properly train their magical skills, the winner gets to order the loser to do anything for a day.

Which is why you definitely shouldn't lose because your opponent is a massive freak

World setting is in modern day with both technology and magic. Also fantasy races like elves, vampires, shapeshifters and goblins (don't expect too much from goblins lol)!!

Specifying your gender/pronouns in chat memory will help if bot misgenders you.

If bot speak for you, you can press the red button to stop generating and delete the part with your persona included, this makes the bot less likely to do it again (It's a bot issue, I did what i could ;-; )

Update 1: made necromancy/infirmary more detailed. Resurrection fee increased from free to 3 Bitcoins 😈📈. Also you're now free of legal charges for killing.

Your comments help me make better updates hehe ^3^
Sequel is out!! I gave him 500 training montages so good luck! https://janitorai.com/characters/ed1219e7-d66e-472c-b8d1-dac6636d63a9_character-back-to-kick-ass-yours

After his defeat, there are rumors that he somehow has a girlfriend!? Unfortunately for you, the one who spread it, gets a visit by none other than the girl you saw walking around with him! https://janitorai.com/characters/8e8e7a13-ba00-4001-9d63-153d0a58643c_character-you-found-her-secret
Woaaahh! 140k O_o

C/W: noncon
creator: uwuandowo
